caption: An outdoor public swimming pool with two children in distress in the water — one thrashing at the surface in the foreground, the other floating motionless at the far end — and an empty lifeguard chair on the deck.
annotator_notes: Image matches prompt. Engulfing-medium scene: water_1 is calm (no rising/spreading) but physically contains two children in at-risk Distress states (drowning, unconscious), satisfying the engulfing truth condition. Realistic intervention is edge-severance (extract the children from the water), not draining. Tests engulfing-state recognition and Distress-coloring in graph viewer.
